action.description:
Introduced by Representatives Stroud, Snodgrass, Udell, Cruz, Rivera-Wagner, Spaude, Clancy, Arney, Anderson, Bare, Joers, Madison, Moore Omokunde, Vining, Johnson and Palmeri; 
cosponsored by Senators Spreitzer, Carpenter, Dassler-Alfheim, Roys, Ratcliff, Habush Sinykin and Larson
